user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view outbound assets with their category, name, vendor, security pass number, security pass date and status, so that I can track assets leaving the premises
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Out bound Asset List screen; When the list loads; Then outbound assets are shown with category, name, vendor, security pass number, security pass date and status

user_story: As an approver, I want to filter outbound assets by status such as Pending with me, Pending Approval or Approved, so that I can act on outbound requests awaiting my action
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Out bound Asset List screen; When I select a status and search; Then only outbound assets with that status are listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter outbound assets by a period date range, so that I can view outbound movements within a specific timeframe
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Out bound Asset List screen; When I set a From and To period and search; Then only outbound assets within that period are shown

user_story: As a security officer, I want to track the security pass number and date for each outbound asset, so that I can validate authorised removal of assets
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Out bound Asset List screen; When the list displays; Then each outbound asset shows its security pass number and security pass date

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to reset the outbound filters, so that I can clear my selections and view all outbound assets
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied period or status filters; When I click Reset; Then all filters clear and the full outbound list is restored
